local function J(J)return Y[J-(-707696-(-718628))]end do local return(function(Y,R,C,L,q,c,K,H,U,k,N,h,u,W,e,B,Z,P,G,D,Q,a,d,r)a,k,W,Z,r,h,e,U,H,P,u,Q,d,N,B,G,D=function(Y,J)local R=U(J)local C=function(C,L,q,c,K)return D(Y,{C;L,q,c;K},J,R)end return C
